content.name: X4Native Class Dump
content.description: One-shot research tool: dumps the full entity class registry (name + numeric ID) to CSV files on game load. Disable after first run.
content.author: eg3r

text.description: One-shot research tool: dumps the full entity class registry (name + numeric ID) to CSV files on game load. Disable after first run.
text.name: X4Native Class Dump
